data.name: Monster Girl Invasion RPG - Part 1
data.detailed_description:
Travel across a dangerous world filled with frenzied monster girls that regularly try to seduce men.

Humans live in fear, conflict happens often, and monster girls invade towns and villages to seduce the men. Any man that gives in to temptation and is 'finished' by a monster girl becomes bound to the monster girl.

Monster girls are ostracised from society. Forced to live in secret and with a human civilization hungry for revenge, war brews on the horizon.

One young man discovers he has the special power to cure the monster girls and embarks on a treacherous journey, risking becoming tempted himself.

With his party of allies and cured monster girls, he attempts to set the wheels of change in motion and fix this broken world.

The gameplay consists of classic JRPG style familiar to those who enjoy old school games of the genre. During your adventure you will get into battles with monster girls where they will either try to KO you or seduce you.

If you lose, they seduce you, if you win, you may be able to convince them to join you.

  • 30+ Different Monster Girl Types

  • Varied H-Scenes featuring monster girls

  • Classic JRPG Combat with many classes and abilities

  • A large world to explore with many secrets

  • Recruit monster girls and create a party unique to your playstyle

  • There is much more to come!

data.short_description: Monster Girl Invasion is a JRPG style Adult game featuring monster girls. Battle, Recruit and be dominated! Travel across a dangerous world filled with frenzied monster girls that love to seduce men!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows® 8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x720 or better Display

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS 10.13 or better
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x720 or better Display

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Hopefully Any?
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x720 or better Display
